Villa Balbiano is one of the most important historical properties on Lake Como, situated between Il Dosso di Lavedo and the Comacine Island. Part of The Heritage Collection, the villa has been restored to its original splendor, combining luxury and fine art to create an unforgettable setting for exclusive weddings and celebrations.
